title.en: Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor shuttled quic...

content.en:
Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor knew that he couldn't kill Ye Tian, but he didn't want to let Ye Tian go.

A forbidden treasure, although he doesn't know what the forbidden treasure is, how can he give it up so easily?

Pursue!

Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor shuttled quickly and chased towards Ye Tian.

Ye Tian used Tiangang's extreme speed, but after all, this was only a Thousand Dao Technique, even if he cultivated to the extreme level, the speed was not too fast.

And the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor is different, he has the strongest Dao Technique, how fast is it, it didn't take long for him to catch up with Ye Tian, and he fought with Ye Tian again.

And at this time, the other supreme Dao Ancestors were also about to descend.

"I can't be dragged by the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor, otherwise when the other Supreme Dao Ancestors arrive, I won't be able to leave at all!"

Ye Tian frowned.

But his strength is comparable to that of the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor, but in fact it is still weaker, but his forbidden body has been tempered to sixty percent, and the forbidden body of the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor has only just become a small one, so he can weaken more attack power, which leads to being able to fight with the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor.

But in fact, his speed was much weaker than that of the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor, and his strongest attack power was also a little weaker.

According to this battle comparison, he couldn't get rid of the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

Another supreme Dao Ancestor has arrived, it is the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Sect, this is a supreme Dao Ancestor who is even more powerful than the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor.

"Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor, the forbidden treasure is on you?"

Yakumo Dao Ancestor asked.

"Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor, can't you see that I'm preventing the Nine Extremes Heavenly General from leaving?

Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor said coldly.

The Eight Cloud Dao Ancestors immediately joined the ranks of besieging Ye Tian, and the two strongest Dao Ancestors easily suppressed Ye Tian, and even beat Ye Tian to the point where he was constantly injured.

Abrupt.

Another breath of the Supreme Dao Ancestor was approaching, and Ye Tian knew that he couldn't delay it any longer.

He took out a leaf, it was a forbidden void leaf, it was a forbidden strange object of the escape class, it was a relatively valuable of the forbidden strange things he had, and he had been reluctant to use it, but now it must be used.

Wow!

The Forbidden Void Leaf turned into a forbidden rule and wrapped Ye Tian, and instantly broke through the space of the forbidden land and left here, the speed was too fast, even the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor and the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor couldn't stop it.

"Forbidden and strange things like escapes? Hmph, we have them too!"

The Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor and the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor also used similar escape forbidden strange objects to chase and kill Ye Tian.

I have to say that Ye Tian still underestimated these supreme Dao Ancestors, who can cultivate to become a supreme Dao Ancestor, there are almost no defects, and they are very comprehensive in all aspects, so it is simply too difficult to get rid of a supreme Dao Ancestor!

Somewhere in Huoyan's forbidden place, Ye Tian's figure appeared, and he quickly left here.

But it's a pity that the Supreme Dao Ancestors' chasing ability is too strong, and they also came here almost instantly, and they sensed Ye Tian's location and chased and killed again.

For the strongest Dao Ancestors, Ye Tian's magical powers and secret techniques that conceal his aura are all useless, and they don't want to escape at all.

Soon, the news that Ye Tian had snatched a forbidden treasure spread, and many powerhouses knew about it.

Flame Forbidden, another.

General Blood, General Ferris and others also heard about this, and they all frowned and worried.

"The Nine Extremes Heavenly General was chased and killed by many supreme Dao Ancestors, it's a bit dangerous!"

The Bloody General muttered.

"Can you ask the Wind King and them to come to the rescue of the Nine Extremes Heavenly General?" asked the Sky General.

"No!" the Bloody General shook his head, "I tried to contact the Wind King just now, and the Wind King has already returned to the Black Wind Mountain, and said that he will not participate again this time, and let us leave as soon as we leave, and not participate in the battle for the forbidden land of Huoyan." But where are we willing to give up, there are too many forbidden and strange things here, and you can get a lot of them by looking for them. "

The Ferris General also sighed, it was obviously impossible for them to give up, and the Wind King was unwilling to participate, so there was no way to support the Nine Extremes Heavenly General.

"I can only rely on the Nine Extremes Heavenly General himself!"

The bloody general sighed.

Time passed little by little, and there were more and more supreme Dao Ancestors chasing Ye Tian, of course, not all of them came to hunt down Ye Tian, after all, the forbidden treasures in Huoyan Forbidden Land were not one or two, and as more and more forbidden supreme treasures were born, other supreme Dao ancestors also went to snatch them.

However, the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor and the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor refused to give up, and they had been chasing and killing Ye Tian, causing Ye Tian to use a lot of forbidden strange things, but he still couldn't get rid of the tracking.

Abrupt.

When Ye Tian was shuttling, he was suddenly grabbed by a white and tender hand.

Ye Tian wanted to resist, but sensing a familiar aura, he immediately stopped.

"Jiu'er!"

Ye Tian saw the person in front of him and said in surprise.

"You try to hide your breath as much as possible, and I will perform the Shadowless Divine Step, so that the strongest Dao Ancestors will not be able to sense your existence!" Ouyang Jiu'er hurriedly said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Ye Tian's breath disappeared, and with the help of the Shadowless Divine Step, it seemed that he had completely disappeared from heaven and earth, and without any information about him and the past in this world, no cause and effect, time and space Dao technique could spy on his existence.

Woohoo!!

When the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor and the Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor descended in this area, they couldn't sense Ye Tian's existence, and they used a variety of tracking secret techniques, but they still couldn't detect it, and they immediately frowned.

"How is it possible, how did the aura of the Nine Extremes Heavenly General disappear?"

Heavenly Cultivator Dao Ancestor was puzzled.

"I can't find him either!" Yayun Dao Ancestor said, "Could it be that he has fallen?"

"It's impossible to fall!" Heavenly Cultivation Dao Ancestor hurriedly retorted: "His strength is not much weaker than the strength we have exerted, and he is a Supreme True Ancestor, even if he is seriously injured, he can be repaired with the power of the Origin, the power of the Origin is endless, where is it so easy to be killed, and it is still killed instantly? Unless it is the Domain Ancestor's shot, it is almost the same!"

"It is estimated that he used some kind of treasure that he has been reluctant to use, and he has completely hidden it!"

Yakumo Daozu guessed.

Ye Tian couldn't be found, and the two Supreme Dao Ancestors didn't want to waste time, so they left quickly to snatch other forbidden treasures.

------------------

"Jiu'er, thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

If it weren't for Ouyang Jiu'er this time, he would be in trouble, whether he would die or not, at most, he would lose this replica body, as well as a large number of forbidden strange objects and a forbidden treasure.

"I also heard your news, so I came over, you are also bold, knowing that the forbidden treasure is something that the strongest Dao ancestors snatched, you also dare to snatch it. You think that you are me, and you can easily avoid the detection of the strongest Dao Ancestors!" Ouyang Jiu'er glanced at him and said.

"I'm really not going to snatch the Forbidden Treasure, but the Forbidden Treasure appears in front of me close to my face, if I don't take it, wouldn't it be too stupid!"

Ye Tian explained.

"Let's not talk about this for a while, I've already determined where the forbidden treasure stored in the Heavenly Emperor Palace inside the Huoyan Forbidden Land is!" Ouyang Jiu'er said mysteriously.

"Found that forbidden treasure!"

Ye Tian was very moved, and immediately said, "Can we take it?"

"We can't take it away, unless we pack up Huoyan forbidden places and take them away!" Ouyang Jiu'er joked.

Ye Tian said again: "Isn't that forbidden treasure capable of evolving the future path, should we start it first and evolve the future path for ourselves?"

"No!" Ouyang Jiu'er said: "That forbidden treasure is called the Haotian Emperor Mirror, and it takes a lot of life blood of True Ancestor and Dao Ancestor to activate it, otherwise it won't take long to activate it by relying on its own strength." During this time, the True Ancestors have fallen quite a bit, and I have been collecting corpses. You can also collect some corpses as soon as possible, the corpses of forbidden bloodline creatures can also be collected, and when the time comes, collect enough, and then sacrifice them to the Haotian Emperor Mirror!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, the two of them began to walk in the Huoyan Forbidden Place, collecting forbidden strange objects while collecting the corpse blood of True Ancestor, Dao Ancestor, and Forbidden Blood Creature.

And just like that, time passed slowly, and another day passed.

At this time, nine forbidden treasures had already appeared in the Huoyan Forbidden Land.

Among them, Ye Tian snatched one, Ouyang Jiu'er snatched one before, Fire King snatched one, Tianhai Sect snatched one, Ten Thousand Domains Temple snatched one, and Mitian Sect snatched one.

As for the whereabouts of the other three forbidden treasures, no one knows.

"Brother Ye, let's go to the Haotian Emperor Mirror, now that the forbidden treasure has almost appeared, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will expose the Haotian Emperor Mirror at any time and start their plan, so let's go over and use the Haotian Emperor Mirror first!"

Ouyang Jiu'er urged.

Immediately, the two of them set off and quickly went to the place where the Haotian Emperor Mirror was.
